content.problemStatement:
Chef is trying to entertain NNN children. He has 222 options:


Buy a single television for all the children to watch. This will cost 100010001000 rupees.
Buy NNN toys, one for each child. This will cost 200200200 rupees for each toy.
What is the minimum cost Chef needs to pay to entertain all the children?


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains a single integer NNN - the number of children.


Output Format
Output the cost to entertain all children.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Chef can buy 111 toy for the only child and spend 200200200 rupees. This is cheaper than buying a television for 100010001000 rupees.

Explanation:
Chef can buy a television for all 101010 children to watch. This is cheaper than buying 101010 individual toys costing 200020002000 rupees.
